title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NHB - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NHB - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NHB are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
